sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n111334" key="filoneike/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φῐλονεικ-έω</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φῐλονεικ-ία</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φῐλόνεικ-ος</orth>, v <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">φιλονικ-έω, -ία, -ος.</foreign> </entryFree>
